routes.testTitle: returns the exact health contract in normal mode
returns the raw exact valid manifest with no-store caching
POST /api/session creates a public session and strict local cookie
GET /api/session returns the authenticated public user
DELETE /api/session invalidates an authenticated session and remains idempotent
POST /api/payment-tokens returns distinct opaque five-minute tokens for approved scenarios only
a successful order uses canonical item order, server totals, an opaque id, and replays exactly once
GET /api/products returns the exact stable catalogue for an authenticated session
